name: iris-interop-skills
description: 17 skills that steer Claude when building IRIS For Health Interoperability productions — messages, BS/BP/BO, BPL, DTL transformations, HL7 v2 schemas, SOAP/REST, FHIR, DICOM, lookup tables, alerting, security, production lifecycle, message search/debug, and a TDD-first workflow. Start at the iris-interop router. Assumes an IRIS MCP server (iris-agentic-dev or iris-interop-dev) is available. Ships 2 PostToolUse hooks + 3 agents (interop-builder, deploy-smoke-test, introspect-dont-guess).
